narration: Science has a clearer story about antibiotic spectrum than social media does.

narration: Antibiotic spectrum refers to the range of bacteria an antibiotic can affect.
visual_description: Context visual: Antibiotic spectrum refers to the range of bacteria an antibiotic can affect.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Antibiotic spectrum refers to the range of bacteria an antibiotic can affect.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Antibiotic spectrum refers to the range of bacteria an antibiotic can affect.

narration: Broad-spectrum antibiotics target many bacteria, but narrow-spectrum ones zero in on specific types. Why does it matter?
visual_description: Escalation visual: Broad-spectrum antibiotics target many bacteria, but narrow-spectrum ones zero in on specific types. Why does it matter?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Broad-spectrum antibiotics target many bacteria, but narrow-spectrum ones zero in on specific types. Why does it matter?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Broad-spectrum antibiotics target many bacteria, but narrow-spectrum ones zero in on specific types. Why does it matter?

narration: Overusing broad-spectrum antibiotics can lead to resistance. This could make future infections harder to treat.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Overusing broad-spectrum antibiotics can lead to resistance. This could make future infections harder to treat.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Overusing broad-spectrum antibiotics can lead to resistance. This could make future infections harder to treat.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Overusing broad-spectrum antibiotics can lead to resistance. This could make future infections harder to treat.

narration: Understanding antibiotic spectrum helps us use them wisely. It’s about preserving their power.
